title: tonningia nodiflora
intro: Tonningia nodiflora, also known as Tonningia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The Tonningia nodiflora plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Tonningia nodiflora is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, which can be used to treat various ailments, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
